name: Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
2. Line a 12-cup muffin pan with paper baking cups or grease the bottoms of the muffin cups.
3. In a large bowl, mix milk, melted butter, and egg until well combined.
4. Stir in flour, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, chocolate chips, and chopped walnuts until just combined (the batter will be lumpy).
5. Fill each muffin cup about 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Her notes:
I don't use paper baking cups; instead, spray the bottoms of the muffin depressions in the pan with Pam.
Increase the amount of chocolate chips and nuts slightly as desired.
After removing the muffins from the oven, loosen them with a fork and tilt to create a crisper crust on the bottom and sides.
